disclaimer: Aggregated research norms for Grade I–II hamstring strain (male soccer, ~20–30 yr). Green = at or ahead of the typical case at this phase; Amber = within 1 SD behind; Red = >1 SD behind. Decision SUPPORT only — not return-to-play clearance. No female norms; apply clinical judgement.
